context: Tests whether a SwiftUI PencilKit wrapper follows the skill's tool picker observer, first-responder, drawing policy, and binding-synchronization guidance.

checklist.name: Canvas observer
checklist.description: Registers the PKCanvasView as an observer of the PKToolPicker so picker selections update the canvas tool.

checklist.name: Retained picker
checklist.description: Stores one PKToolPicker for the canvas lifetime instead of recreating it during updates or appearances.

checklist.name: First responder
checklist.description: Calls setVisible for the canvas and makes the canvas first responder when showing the picker.

checklist.name: SwiftUI guard
checklist.description: Avoids a SwiftUI update loop by assigning the bound PKDrawing to the canvas only when the drawings differ.

checklist.name: No tool reset
checklist.description: Does not reset canvas.tool from updateUIView in a way that overwrites picker selections.

checklist.name: Default policy
checklist.description: Explains that the default drawing policy is system-setting aware when the tool picker is visible and otherwise only Apple Pencil draws.

checklist.name: Any input
checklist.description: Correctly identifies any-input behavior as allowing both Pencil and finger drawing.

checklist.name: Pencil only
checklist.description: Correctly identifies pencil-only behavior as allowing only Apple Pencil touches to draw on the canvas.

checklist.name: Coordinator delegate
checklist.description: Uses a Coordinator or equivalent delegate path to propagate canvas drawing changes back to SwiftUI state.
